evaluation (internal):
+--------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                              |
+--------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                       |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Float64([3.4]), validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+-------------------------------------------------------------------+

evaluation (internal):
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                                                             |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                                                                      |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: ArrayColumn { values: Float64([1, 2.5, 4]), offsets: [0, 3] }, validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: quantile_cont(0.8)(d)
evaluation (internal):
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                 |
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+
| d      | Column(Decimal64([4.00, 3.00, 2.00, 1.00]))                          |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Decimal64([3.00]), validity: [0b_______1] } |
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------------+


error: quantile_cont does not support type 'Null'

ast: quantile_cont(0.8)(x_all_null)
evaluation (internal):
+------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column     | Data                                                                            |
+------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| x_all_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0000] }) |
| Output     | NullableColumn { column: Float64([0]), validity: [0b_______0] }                 |
+------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: quantile_cont(0.0, 0.5, 1.0)(x_all_null)
evaluation (internal):
+------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column     | Data                                                                                                    |
+------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| x_all_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0000] })                         |
| Output     | NullableColumn { column: ArrayColumn { values: Float64([]), offsets: [0, 0] }, validity: [0b_______0] } |
+------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: quantile_cont(0.8)(x_null)
evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                                            |

| x_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0011] }) |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Float64([1.8]), validity: [0b_______1] }               |
+--------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
